subcategory: statistics card with avatar and status indicators
use_cases: Displaying user statistics with profile avatars and status in dashboard interfaces
Showing member activity metrics with online/offline presence indicators
Rendering profile information cards for user directories or team views
Presenting performance metrics with user attribution and status
Creating social platform user cards with activity indicators
ai_summary: A shadcn/ui-style statistics card component featuring Radix UI Avatar primitives with status indicators (online/offline/busy/away). Uses class-variance-authority for variant management and follows clean, minimalist design patterns. Supports image display with fallback initials, bordered containers, and customizable status dots. Ideal for SaaS dashboards, user profiles, and data-heavy interfaces requiring user attribution with presence indicators.
